languages.text: "Пациент прервал операцию по удалению аугмента и оказывает сопротивление принятым протоколам лечения".
"The patient disrupted the augment removal procedure and is resisting the accepted treatment protocols."
languages.original_text: "Пациент прервал операцию по удалению аугмента и оказывает сопротивление принятым протоколам лечения".

traits.locale_text: "The patient disrupted the augment removal procedure and is resisting the accepted treatment protocols."
"The patient disrupted the augment removal procedure and is resisting the accepted treatment protocols."
"The patient disrupted the augment removal procedure and is resisting the accepted treatment protocols."

languages.text: 「患者は増幅器の除去手術を妨害し、受け入れられている治療法に抵抗している」
languages.original_text: "The patient disrupted the augment removal procedure and is resisting the accepted treatment protocols."

traits.locale_text: 「患者は増幅器の除去手術を妨害し、受け入れられている治療法に抵抗している」

languages.text: "Hasta, ogment çıkarma prosedürünü bozdu ve kabul edilen tedavi protokollerine direniyor."
languages.original_text: "The patient disrupted the augment removal procedure and is resisting the accepted treatment protocols."

traits.locale_text: "Hasta, ogment çıkarma prosedürünü bozdu ve kabul edilen tedavi protokollerine direniyor."

languages.text: «El paciente ha interrumpido el procedimiento de retirada de aumentos y se resiste a los protocolos de tratamiento aceptados».
languages.original_text: "The patient disrupted the augment removal procedure and is resisting the accepted treatment protocols."

traits.locale_text: «El paciente ha interrumpido el procedimiento de retirada de aumentos y se resiste a los protocolos de tratamiento aceptados».

languages.text: “病人中断了植入物移除程序，正在抗拒既定治疗方案。”
languages.original_text: "The patient disrupted the augment removal procedure and is resisting the accepted treatment protocols."

traits.locale_text: “病人中断了植入物移除程序，正在抗拒既定治疗方案。”

languages.text: « Le patient a perturbé l'opération de retrait des augmentations et résiste aux protocoles de traitement établis. »
languages.original_text: "The patient disrupted the augment removal procedure and is resisting the accepted treatment protocols."

traits.locale_text: « Le patient a perturbé l'opération de retrait des augmentations et résiste aux protocoles de traitement établis. »

languages.text: "Der Patient hat die Prozedur der Augmentationsentfernung unterbrochen und widersetzt sich den etablierten Behandlungsprotokollen."
languages.original_text: "The patient disrupted the augment removal procedure and is resisting the accepted treatment protocols."

traits.locale_text: "Der Patient hat die Prozedur der Augmentationsentfernung unterbrochen und widersetzt sich den etablierten Behandlungsprotokollen."
